combat: A hostile presence blocks your path.
The floor is stained from countless battles.
Your footsteps echo through the chamber.
This place was built for bloodshed.
trap: This corridor was designed to kill.
One wrong step could end the run.
treasure: A faint glow catches your eye.
The room is untouched… for now.
A chest rests in the center of the room.
The scent of old metal fills the air.
rest: A safe place… at least for now.
A healing light glows softly nearby.
You recover for the battles ahead.
A moment of calm settles over the arena.
The dungeon grants a brief reprieve.
boss: This chamber belongs to a champion.
The walls tremble with heavy footsteps.
The crowd erupts as the boss awakens.
A towering figure emerges from the darkness.
You feel the pressure of countless fallen challengers.
Your journey has led to this moment.

returnRoomIntros: Something has changed since your last visit.
You notice signs of recent activity.
New danger emerges from old ruins.
postBossVictory: The arena crown has changed hands.

1.title: Entry
transitions: You descend into abandoned arenas and forgotten pits.
Collapsed training halls echo with old violence.
Cursed ruins swallow the light ahead.
The underground combat pit waits below.

2.title: Discovery
transitions: The arena feels corrupted — champions twisted into monsters.
Relics pulse beneath the stone. Something controls these trials.
Rooms shift when you look away. The dungeon is alive.

3.title: Ascent
transitions: Each victory draws you deeper. The arena grows hungrier.
Bosses fall, but the pressure never fades.
Fragments of power cling to you — the depths demand more.

4.title: Final Challenge
transitions: The final gate looms. One champion remains.
Every fallen fighter led to this chamber.
The arena master will not yield easily.

entryReasons: A rescue mission — someone is down here.
Survival tournament. No exit until you win.
This route may be your only escape.
Recover the lost relic before it corrupts further.
Bounty hunting — the arena owes a debt.
Prove your strength to the world above.
Reclaim what the city lost to the pits.
A survival challenge you cannot refuse.
bossPurposes: Corrupted champion of the old league.
Elite hunter sent to end intruders.
